summary: Stellar second‑set jam between Playing in the Band and China Doll captured on an unknown‑source recording
review: The reviewer, who was at the show, raves about a cooking second set where Phil Lesh “dropped some bombs” during the extended jam linking Playing in the Band into China Doll. While no specifics are given about the audio source, the performance is described as far from run‑of‑the‑mill and worth hearing.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review highlights an exceptional jam and strong band performance; recording quality is not discussed, so rating leans on show quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments about sound clarity or mix; assumed listenable.

standout_songs: Playing in the Band > China Doll
show_quality.setlist_flow: Set list appears ordinary on paper, but the second‑set jam between Playing in the Band and China Doll is highlighted as a cooking, high‑energy performance.

band_member_comments.Phil: Phil dropped some bombs and was 'driving the bus' during the second set jam.
